articles.title: JPMORGAN TO LET CLIENTS USE CRYPTO AS COLLATERAL FOR LOANS
articles.summary: JPMorgan is developing a framework that will allow institutional clients to use Bitcoin and Ethereum as collateral for loans. The program is expected to launch by the end of 2025 under a third-party custody model where approved custodians hold the pledged tokens. This marks one of the most direct integrations of crypto assets into Wall Street's credit systems to date. It positions BTC and ETH within the same collateral ecosystem as traditional instruments like Treasuries and equities. The move introduces significant operational challenges, as banks must now manage 24/7 mark-to-market assets with real-time volatility modeling, dynamic margin requirements, and custodial risk insurance within legacy settlement infrastructure.

articles.title: BASE TOKEN COULD BE WORTH AS MUCH AS $34 BILLION
articles.summary: JPMorgan analysts projected that a Base network token could achieve a market cap of $12 billion to $34 billion based on current network activity and "lofty token economics," with Coinbase likely retaining 40% of the supply. The bank raised its Coinbase rating and lifted its December 2026 price target to $404, citing the Base token exploration as part of a broader shift toward "deeper onchain monetization" alongside changes to USDC rewards and new DEX integration features. JPMorgan's analysis also highlighted that Coinbase could retain approximately $374 million annually by limiting USDC yield payouts to Coinbase One subscribers rather than all users, and noted the Base-integrated DEX aggregator as a strategic hedge against decentralized exchanges now capturing roughly 25% of spot trading volume.

articles.title: FROM UPLOAD TO ACCESS: HOW X402 EXPANDS CLOUD
articles.summary: AR.IO is integrating x402, an open protocol for internet-native payments that uses HTTP status code 402 to enable pay-per-request transactions with zero built-in fees, instant settlement, and blockchain-agnostic compatibility. The protocol will allow AR.IO's 650+ gateways serving the Permanent Cloud to monetize traffic directly at the request level, creating a two-sided economic model where users pay for uploads via Turbo and for data access via x402. Gateway operators gain direct monetization beyond staking rewards while maintaining control over pricing and access, with the ability to whitelist specific ArNS names to serve for free and protect against abuse from bad actors attaching names to massive files.

articles.title: DECENTRALIZING X402 PAYMENTS
articles.summary: A developer released an open-source library that lets anyone run their own x402 payment facilitator, removing the need to register or depend on Coinbase's platform for mainnet integration. The tool enables developers to self-host payment rails directly within their apps using just a few lines of code, avoiding centralization risks or censorship.

articles.title: X402 TRANSACTIONS EXPLODE OVER 10,000% IN A MONTH
SIX YEARS OF CRYPTO LESSONS, CONDENSED
articles.summary: The six-year crypto playbook emphasizes focus, discipline, and adaptability. One must figure out their niche, define their edge, and understand narratives to navigate the attention-driven market. Trade with clear plans and smart sizing, ride winners, and keep a concentrated portfolio that prioritizes conviction over diversification. Finally, track performance and use AI-driven journaling to refine your strategy and continuously improve.

articles.title: DEFI FOR AI AGENTS IS THE NEXT BIG THING
articles.summary: AI agents are automating DeFi strategies across stablecoin yields, Bitcoin yields, Pendle PT token management, and trading execution, offering advantages like 24/7 operation, direct smart contract interaction, and emotion-free decision-making. Projects like Almanak manage over $164M in stablecoins offering 15% APY, while Gizatech's Pulse Agents manage 1,250+ ETH on Pendle with fixed 12% returns, and Mode Network has deployed fully autonomous breakout and trend trading agents. The automation extends beyond yield farming to trading overlays like HeyAnonai's HUD and copy-trading platforms like Loomlay. Future use cases are expected in airdrop farming, funding rate arbitrage, smart contract audits, and prediction market betting.

articles.title: PREDICTION MARKETS ARE MISUNDERSTOOD BY EVERYONE
L2 “STAGE 2” STILL A MIRAGE
articles.summary: No major Layer 2 on L2Beat has yet achieved Stage 2 decentralization, despite massive funding and engineering talent, perhaps proving that full trustlessness remains impractical under current designs.

articles.title: ETH DATS AND AAVE ARE A MATCH MADE IN HEAVEN
articles.summary: ETH DATs now hold ~3.6% of all ETH and can use Aave to collateralize, borrow, and reinvest, boosting ETH-per-share without dilution.

articles.title: AUTONOMOUS AGENTS ARE NOW RUNNING BUSINESSES WITH X402
articles.summary: Using Coinbase's x402 protocol and Google's A2A (Agent-to-Agent) framework, agents can now autonomously hire, pay, and verify each other, no humans required.

articles.title: ELIZAOS X402 GATEWAY POWERS AGENTIC PAYMENTS
articles.summary: The new ElizaOS x402 MCP Gateway integrates multiple MCP servers to enable autonomous onchain payments for AI agents.
